prompt: I want to start a new R-Ladies chapter in my city. How do I get going, and what will the chapter be set up with?
assertions: Says to use a personal email address (not work/university)
Says the chapter receives a Meetup Pro account
Says the chapter receives a chapter email like yourcity@rladies.org
Says you're added to the Organizers' Slack (and/or Community Slack)
Mentions a GitHub chapter data entry / prospective status
States the activity expectation: first event within 6 months, then at least one event every 6 months
Mentions the mission-alignment confirmation (identify as a woman or gender minority, interested in R)
